security-notes.SEC-101: sweetrdf/easyrdf pinned to ^1.19 (>=1.19.0 <2.0.0). The previous '*' constraint accepted any future major release including a v2 with API breaks. The runtime caller tools/tool_import_rdf/class.tool_import_rdf.php uses the v1 EasyRdf\Graph API.
security-notes.SEC-101-followup: easyrdf is currently in require-dev despite being a runtime dependency of tool_import_rdf. Production deployers running `composer install --no-dev` will be missing it. Moving it to require is a separate functional fix — out of scope here.
